summary_en: 1,000,000 shares (3.61% of S/O), ¥3,500M upper limit, open-market purchase via securities company commission trading, execution window 27 May 2026 to 26 May 2027. Rationale: flexible capital policy in light of current financial position and stock price level; future M&A stock-exchange consideration potential.
title_en: Notice Regarding Decision of Matters Concerning Acquisition of Own Shares
translation_en_brief:
On 26 May 2026, ULURU.CO.,LTD. (TSE Growth, ticker 3979) announced a share buyback authorization. The board resolved to acquire up to 1,000,000 ordinary shares (3.61% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥3,500 million via open-market purchase through a securities company commission-trading arrangement. The execution window runs from 27 May 2026 through 26 May 2027.

The company cites flexible capital policy as the primary rationale, noting current financial position and stock-price levels relative to sector peers. The disclosure mentions that acquired shares may be deployed as stock-exchange consideration in future M&A transactions. The ¥3,500 million limit was set against the legal distributable surplus of ¥359,277 thousand as of 25 May 2026, calculated from standalone balance-sheet equity and adjusted for planned dividend payments.
